default_policy.rationale: Civil time remains the compatibility default; apparent solar time is an explicit, source-backed option when longitude is supplied.

positions.summary: Use historical local civil time from an IANA time zone.

title: Civil time or apparent solar time
user_disclosure: Civil time is the default. Apparent solar time is applied only when explicitly selected with longitude, using the documented NOAA approximation.
